svg.text: Frame lifecycle, shader graph, texture bindings, lighting model

g.text: HBAO: reconstruct world pos from depth
Debug: raw AO | normals | world pos
output = albedo * (hemi * ambient * combined_ao + direct_specular) + point_light_contribution
BOLD=1 ITALIC=2 UNDERLINE=4 STRIKE=8 CURL=16 COLOR=32
Device: MTLDevice Queue: MTLCommandQueue Layer: CAMetalLayer
Buffers: MTLBuffer shared storage (CPU+GPU visible, no staging)
Atlas: 2048x2048 RGBA8 | Depth: D32Float | AO: R8Unorm
Device: VkDevice Allocator: VMA Context: VkContext
Pipelines: VkPipelineManager (lazy creation on render pass change)
Buffers: SSBO host-visible coherent via VMA (no staging for grid)
Atlas: VkAtlas 2048x2048 | Descriptor sets per frame
Per-frame: FrameUniforms buffer, geometry arena, descriptor sets (Vk) | Cyclic: current_frame = (frame + 1) % 2
Grid: host-visible shared buffer (direct writes, no staging) | Pixel format: BGRA8 Unorm (nvim sends sRGB colors)
